hotel.name: Vishaka Paark
hotel.tagline: Where Every Detail Speaks of Care

rooms.description: A plush king-size bed with premium linen, smart TV, climate-control AC, and a private attached bathroom. Designed for the solo business traveller or a couple seeking comfort and quiet.
Two separate premium beds ensuring privacy and independence. Perfect for business colleagues or friends travelling together who want their own space without compromise.
Spacious layout with a king bed plus a single bed. Extra room to spread out, relax, and make every family stay feel like a home away from home.

facilities.name: 24/7 Security & CCTV
facilities.desc: HD CCTV cameras cover all corridors, entry points and common areas — monitored every hour of every day by trained staff.

facilities.name: 24×7 Front Desk
facilities.desc: Our front desk staff are available round the clock — for check-ins at 3am, local tips at midnight, or anything in between.

facilities.name: 24hr Power Backup
facilities.desc: Full generator backup ensures your room stays powered, air-conditioned and connected — no matter what the grid does.

facilities.name: Hot & Cold Water
facilities.desc: Instant hot water available at any hour. No waiting, no cold surprises — a perfect shower every single time.

facilities.name: King Size Bed
facilities.desc: Executive-grade mattresses with plush duvets, crisp white linen, and the signature crimson throw accent unique to Vishaka Paark.

facilities.name: High-Speed Wifi
facilities.desc: High-bandwidth wifi throughout the property — fast enough for video calls, 4K streaming and remote work without interruption.

facilities.name: Complimentary Breakfast
facilities.desc: A fresh, wholesome breakfast is included with every room — served every morning to fuel your day whether for business or leisure.

facilities.name: Pickup & Drop
facilities.desc: Convenient airport and railway station transfers arranged on request. Arrive and depart with absolutely zero stress.

facilities.name: Parking Facilities
facilities.desc: Dedicated, CCTV-monitored parking space for every guest's vehicle — available anytime, included in your stay at no extra charge.

facilities.name: Safe RO Drinking Water
facilities.desc: Filtered RO-purified drinking water available in every room. Safe, clean and refreshing — no need to buy bottles.

facilities.name: 24hr Flexible Checkout
facilities.desc: Unlike most hotels, we offer truly flexible 24-hour checkout — no pressure, no extra fee. A rare and genuine differentiator.

facilities.name: In-Room Entertainment
facilities.desc: Wall-mounted smart TV in every room with access to streaming apps, news and sports — your entertainment, your way.

facilities.name: Prime Location
facilities.desc: Situated on Thudiyalur Road, Saravanampatty — walking distance from major IT campuses, perfectly connected to Coimbatore city.

facilities.name: Attached Bar
facilities.desc: An in-house bar with a curated selection of drinks and beverages — the ideal way to decompress after a long day of work or travel.

facilities.name: Coffee Maker
facilities.desc: A personal coffee maker in every room so you can enjoy a fresh cup whenever you want — early morning or late at night.

facilities.name: Godrej Smart Lock
facilities.desc: Every room uses a Godrej electronic smart lock — tamper-proof, secure, and far more reliable than a traditional key.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Kumar
testimonials.text: The room was immaculate. Loved the wooden headboard with that warm backlight — it made the whole space feel premium. Staff were genuinely kind and the checkout was completely flexible.

testimonials.name: Priya Mohan
testimonials.text: Came with my family and booked the Deluxe Triple. Kids had space to play, breakfast was proper and fresh, and the price was very reasonable compared to other hotels nearby.

testimonials.name: Suresh Anand
testimonials.text: Location is unbeatable if you're working in the IT corridor. Fast Wi-Fi, comfortable beds, smooth check-in. Will definitely book again on my next trip to Coimbatore.

testimonials.name: Divya Venkat
testimonials.text: Staycation done right. The bar is a bonus I did not expect. Clean rooms, great breakfast, and the staff remembered my name by day two. Felt like a boutique experience.
